metadata.dataset_name: Cortex Air Mode - Block I Route, Schedule and Tracking Readiness
metadata.purpose: Mock/reference route feasibility, schedule input, tracking milestone, and route risk dataset for Cortex air-mode R&D readiness checks.
metadata.legal_note: R&D/mock reference only. It does not provide live schedules, live capacity, booking confirmation, or real AWB tracking. Use live carrier/forwarder/schedule/tracking APIs before operational use.
metadata.integration_note: Run Block I after Blocks A-H. It turns the previous readiness checks into route-level readiness: direct/transit route, carrier per leg, aircraft per leg, transit capability, security/PLACI, booking status, capacity status and tracking milestones.
recommended_next_research: Live schedule/capacity APIs: CargoAi, WebCargo, OAG, Cirium, SITA, carrier APIs
AWB tracking APIs from carriers or aggregators
Lane-specific minimum connection times for cargo
Temperature-controlled transit dwell-time and active container runtime monitoring

route_feasibility_rules.rule_name: Direct route preferred for time/temperature critical cargo
route_feasibility_rules.applies_to_cargo: pharma, cold-chain, urgent medical, perishables, frozen goods, live animals
route_feasibility_rules.risk_if_missing: route may break cold chain, exceed shelf life, increase animal welfare risk, or miss medical deadline
route_feasibility_rules.message: Prefer direct routing. If direct route is unavailable, every transit airport and carrier leg must be checked.

route_feasibility_rules.applies_to_cargo: DG, PIL, ACT, PER, FRO, AVI, VAL, HEA, BIG, HUM, RDS, RIS
route_feasibility_rules.required_data: transit_airport_codes; Block C capability for each transit; handler capability; storage at transit
route_feasibility_rules.risk_if_missing: shipment may be accepted at origin but fail during transit
route_feasibility_rules.message: Special cargo requires transit airport/handler capability validation, not just origin and destination.

route_feasibility_rules.rule_name: Carrier acceptance must cover every leg
route_feasibility_rules.required_data: carrier_per_leg; interline carrier; Block D acceptance per carrier; interline handover rules
route_feasibility_rules.risk_if_missing: one carrier may accept while another refuses the cargo
route_feasibility_rules.message: Every operating carrier and interline leg must accept the cargo category.

route_feasibility_rules.route_condition: Block A air_status = cargo_aircraft_only OR code = CAO
route_feasibility_rules.required_data: aircraft_type_per_leg; passenger_or_freighter; carrier CAO acceptance; flight freighter confirmation
route_feasibility_rules.risk_if_missing: cargo may be incorrectly routed on passenger aircraft
route_feasibility_rules.message: Cargo-aircraft-only shipments require confirmed freighter/all-cargo routing.

route_feasibility_rules.required_data: passenger_or_freighter per leg; security status; station security acceptance
route_feasibility_rules.risk_if_missing: shipment may be placed on passenger aircraft despite security restriction
route_feasibility_rules.message: SCO cargo is all-cargo aircraft only from security standpoint unless security status changes.

route_feasibility_rules.rule_name: Passenger belly requires passenger-eligible security status
route_feasibility_rules.required_data: security_code; screening status; SPX/equivalent proof; station security confirmation
route_feasibility_rules.risk_if_missing: cargo not legally/security-ready for passenger aircraft
route_feasibility_rules.message: Passenger belly routing requires passenger-eligible screened/secured status.

route_feasibility_rules.rule_name: Aircraft fit confirmed for every leg
route_feasibility_rules.applies_to_cargo: heavy, oversized, overhang, active ULD, built-up units
route_feasibility_rules.required_data: aircraft_type_per_leg; ULD type; door dimensions; main/lower deck; piece dimensions/weight
route_feasibility_rules.risk_if_missing: cargo may fit one leg but fail on another aircraft
route_feasibility_rules.message: Physical fit must be checked for every aircraft leg, not only the first flight.

route_feasibility_rules.rule_name: PLACI lane requires advance data before loading
route_feasibility_rules.applies_to_cargo: all air cargo on PLACI-regulated lanes
route_feasibility_rules.required_data: shipper; consignee; goods_description; pieces; weight; origin; destination; AWB/HAWB; security status
route_feasibility_rules.risk_if_missing: pre-loading risk assessment may fail or delay cargo
route_feasibility_rules.message: PLACI-style lanes require complete advance cargo information before loading.

route_feasibility_rules.applies_to_cargo: urgent medical, pharma, perishables, frozen goods
route_feasibility_rules.required_data: latest_acceptable_arrival; shelf_life; temperature_runtime; delivery_deadline; cutoff time
route_feasibility_rules.risk_if_missing: cannot evaluate whether route meets business/medical/quality deadline
route_feasibility_rules.message: Time-critical cargo requires a hard deadline and cutoff/arrival timing data.

route_feasibility_rules.rule_name: Booking and capacity must be confirmed
route_feasibility_rules.required_data: booking_status; capacity_status; carrier confirmation; flight date
route_feasibility_rules.risk_if_missing: route may be theoretically plausible but not bookable
route_feasibility_rules.message: Without booking/capacity confirmation, Cortex should say route is plausible, not available.

schedule_input_requirements.why_needed: Defines start node and jurisdiction/security/capability context.
Defines destination node and border/security context.
Transit airports need Block C/F/H checks.
Carrier acceptance must pass for every leg.
Needed to link shipment to a flight leg and milestone events.
Capacity, cutoff and acceptance are date-specific.
Needed to evaluate cutoff and connection timing.
Needed to evaluate total transit and latest delivery deadline.

schedule_input_requirements.required_for: Block E fit and cargo type restrictions
schedule_input_requirements.why_needed: Door/deck/ULD/passenger-freighter logic depends on aircraft type.
Some cargo cannot move on passenger aircraft.
Cargo must be tendered and accepted before cutoff.
Transit must allow handling, screening, storage, and transfer.
Schedule is useless if no cargo capacity is available.
Distinguishes plausible route from confirmed route.
Cold-chain may fail at transit without storage/handler plan.
Cargo may be blocked before loading if not screened/secured.
Advance cargo information must be complete before loading.
Tracking milestones are linked to AWB/HAWB references.

tracking_milestones.meaning: Consignment booked on a specific flight or routing.
tracking_milestones.cortex_interpretation: Planned booking exists, but cargo is not yet accepted.

tracking_milestones.meaning: Freight is on hand with the carrier/handler before ready-for-carriage acceptance.
tracking_milestones.cortex_interpretation: Cargo is physically present but not necessarily accepted as ready.

tracking_milestones.meaning: Consignment physically received from shipper/agent and accepted for carriage.
tracking_milestones.cortex_interpretation: Readiness moved from planned to accepted for carriage.

tracking_milestones.meaning: Shipment manifested on a specific flight.
tracking_milestones.cortex_interpretation: Shipment is planned/declared on flight manifest.

tracking_milestones.meaning: Shipment has been loaded onto the flight.
tracking_milestones.cortex_interpretation: Cargo appears loaded; await departure confirmation.

tracking_milestones.meaning: Shipment departed on a specific flight.
tracking_milestones.cortex_interpretation: Cargo has left origin or transfer airport.
Aircraft arrived; cargo still needs handler receipt/processing.

tracking_milestones.meaning: Shipment unloaded/received from flight by handler.
tracking_milestones.cortex_interpretation: Cargo is physically received after flight arrival.

tracking_milestones.meaning: Shipment transferred to another carrier, flight, or airport area.
tracking_milestones.cortex_interpretation: Transit/interline handover occurred; check next leg and dwell risk.

tracking_milestones.meaning: Consignee/agent notified that shipment has arrived or will be ready for collection.
Shipment documents delivered to consignee or agent.
tracking_milestones.cortex_interpretation: Documentation handover occurred; can support clearance/pickup.

tracking_milestones.meaning: Shipment delivered to consignee or agent.
Shipment was offloaded from planned flight or routing.
tracking_milestones.cortex_interpretation: Disruption. Re-route, capacity, acceptance or security issue may exist.
Exception. Investigate piece count, weight, documents or damage.

tracking_milestones.meaning: Cargo missing or not located as expected.
Cargo carried beyond planned destination/transfer point.

route_risk_rules.condition: special cargo and transit airport capability unknown
route_risk_rules.recommended_action: Check Block C transit capability or choose direct route.

route_risk_rules.condition: LHO/SHL/QRT cargo with more than one transit
route_risk_rules.recommended_action: Prefer direct route or one secure short transit with confirmed handover.

route_risk_rules.condition: temperature cargo with unknown transit cold storage or container runtime
route_risk_rules.recommended_action: Confirm cold storage at every transit and active/passive container runtime.

route_risk_rules.condition: CAO cargo but no confirmed freighter/all-cargo leg
SCO security cargo routed on passenger aircraft
route_risk_rules.recommended_action: Use all-cargo aircraft or resolve security status.

route_risk_rules.condition: passenger aircraft selected but cargo security not SPX/equivalent
route_risk_rules.recommended_action: Screen/secure cargo or switch to eligible route.

route_risk_rules.condition: PLACI-regulated lane but advance cargo data incomplete
route_risk_rules.recommended_action: Complete shipper, consignee, description, pieces, weight, AWB/HAWB and route data.

route_risk_rules.condition: large cargo and aircraft type/ULD unknown on one or more legs
route_risk_rules.recommended_action: Run Block E aircraft/ULD fit for every leg.

route_risk_rules.condition: route exists but booking/capacity status unknown
route_risk_rules.recommended_action: Mark route as plausible only; require carrier/forwarder capacity confirmation.
Escalate to carrier/handler and recalculate ETA/routing.

confidence_rules.message: Without live schedule data, Cortex can only say route is plausible, not available.
Without capacity/booking confirmation, route readiness is not confirmed.
Special cargo with transit requires capability and acceptance checks at every transit point.
If DEP/ARR/RCF milestones are missing after expected time, tracking confidence drops.
OFLD/DIS/MSCA/OVCD are exceptions; shipment status should be escalated.
Urgent or cold-chain cargo requires delivery deadline/shelf-life/runtime data.
HEA/BIG/OHG/ACT/BUP cargo requires aircraft type per leg.
Advance cargo data must be complete for PLACI-regulated lanes.

source_refs.use_in_dataset: Digital cargo data-sharing concept and single shipment record vision.
ONE Record as common data model and standardized secured web API.
FSU/RCS and FSU/DEP examples for cargo status messages.

source_refs.source_name: CargoAi Track and Trace API event codes
source_refs.use_in_dataset: Event code meanings including RCF, NFD, AWD, DLV, CLC, CLD, RCT, TFD.
Carrier shipment tracking event type examples such as BKD and RCS.
Current schedule/status API concept including schedules, flight status, cargo operations.
Schedule data fields: carrier, flight number, departure/arrival, flight date, origin/destination, aircraft type, stops.
Route/schedule APIs provide access to flight schedules, routes and capacity information from carriers.
Schedules/routes data for planning and connections.
